remarks: Unlock the potential of this exceptional corner lot property located in one of Westport's most desirable areas. Set on a prime piece of land, this property presents a rare opportunity for builders, investors, or end-users looking to create their dream home.  The existing structure requires renovation or may be best suited for a complete redevelopment, offering the perfect canvas for new construction. Surrounded by established homes and situated in a highly sought-after neighborhood, the value here is truly in the land and location.  Positioned on a corner lot, the property offers added flexibility for design, layout, and curb appeal-an attractive feature for those looking to maximize value.   Enjoy close proximity to town, schools, shopping, and commuter routes, making this an ideal setting for a custom home tailored to today's lifestyle.  Don't miss this chance to capitalize on a premier location and bring your vision to life.
